risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation Capacity
risk_summary: The project operates across two separate political entities (Federal Government of Somalia and Somaliland) with distinct governance structures, creating coordination challenges and institutional fragility that impacts implementation timelines and institutional capacity building.
evidence_quote: The project has two implementing entities: the Federal Ministry of Finance, Somalia and the Ministry of Finance, Somaliland. In both entities, the Project Coordination/Implementation Units are now established.

risk_title: Weak Institutional Capacity and Governance Framework Operationalization
risk_summary: Critical governance and legal frameworks remain non-operationalized, directly impacting project implementation. The procurement and legal/regulatory framework for public financial management has not been operationalized, limiting the ability to achieve accountability and transparency objectives.
evidence_quote: Legal and regulatory framework is not operationalized [as of 30-Sep-2024]. Procurement, legal and regulatory framework operationalized [target for Dec/2027]

risk_title: Governance Capacity Constraints in Federal Member States
risk_summary: Implementation of audit recommendations and financial management improvements in Federal Member States (FMSs) remains severely constrained, with baseline and current performance at only 10% against a target of 75%, indicating weak governance capacity at sub-national level.
evidence_quote: Implementation of previous years' audit recommendations relevant to Ministries of Finance on the consolidated financial statements - FMSs (Percentage): Baseline 10.00, Actual (Current) 10.00, Target 75.00

risk_title: Delayed Implementation in Somaliland Due to Governance Constraints
risk_summary: Somaliland implementation is significantly delayed with project activities just beginning. The indicator for audit recommendation implementation remains at baseline (11%) with a target of only 6%, and preparatory work on citizen feedback mechanisms has not yet started, suggesting governance-related implementation delays.
evidence_quote: Project implementation is just about to start [for Somaliland]. Preparatory work in developing the pilot access points have yet to start.
